feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Marketing Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Marketing Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to set up a single code promo that does not allow sale items?
entry.content: How to set up a single code promo that does not allow sale items?

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - interests after campaign execution not displayed in contact profiles
entry.content:
Hello all,

I need help with the following scenario regarding the collection of interests in combination with the execution of campaigns:

  1. I created a new email campaign with a simple target group and an email that will be sent out to the target group memebers
  2. All the target group members should be marked with specific interests - therefore, I add the corresponding information while configuring the campaign
  3. After the campaign has been executed successfully, I don't see any interest data in the contact profiles

  4. I can see the interaction data but neither the interests nor the tags are displayed in the profile

Is there any configuration missing or what is happening here?

Thanks and regards,
Dennis

entry.title: SMC Generic Email Service Integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As per the Business requirement, we need to Integrate the Azure Email Services with SAP Marking Cloud. We have studied the multiple Blogs with Help.sap.com.

After that I have two questions to your all.

1) Can we integrate Email Services with out CPI/BTP. If yes can you please share any supporting document.

2) We have created the Communication System for Azure and Communication Arrangement also. We have got the doubt what be given as under Path.

Regards,

Hemanth.B.

entry.title: It is possible to create a number range for campaign IDs?
entry.content:
Hello experts

They ask me to validate the option of constructing my own number range for the IDs that are created when creating a campaign.

I checked the system but I think it is not possible.

IDs are created by the system and cannot be modified.

kind regards

Elio

entry.title: Adding campaigns to program after they have finished
entry.content: Wondering if there is any way to add campaigns to a program after they have finished. In cases where a campaign has not been correctly added to the proper Program, and needs to be added after execution for year-end analysis.

entry.title: Create Segment - By Reducing Randomly
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently trying to segment using Reducing Randomly but the only available reference object is email. How can we add a mobile number here as well? Is this possible?

If yes, how can we extend it?

Thanks in advance!

Marc

entry.title: Can I find the Weekday of a Timestamp or Date field in SAP Marketing Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I want to know if SAP Marketing Cloud has a function to extract the Weekday from a Date or a Timestamp in the Segmentation Models, or if that can be enabled from the Segmentation Configuration?

I will explain the use case for this request:

My team is working on a "Welcome" campaign for our clients, the campaign is to be sent the next day after a contact becomes a client, that means our target groups and segmentation models filter the new contacts created from one day before (today) in a daily campaign.

But we as a company have a restriction to send campaigns only from Monday to Friday, that means that new clients created on Friday and/or Saturday don't receive the campaign because the target group only references the day before. (We can't increase our time filter from more than one day because we don't want to risk sending the campaign more than once to our new customers).

A solution we have identified is through the segmentation model filtering the day of the week in which the new client was created, so that we could identify if it's created on Friday or Saturday and create a separate target group to a separate campaign.

Is that possible in SAP Marketing Cloud? Are there other alternatives?

entry.title: How to use a Preference Center with Accounts
entry.content:
Hi,

We are sending emails from SAP Marketing Cloud to both Accounts and to Contacts.

We set up a Preference Center, which is a Form/Landing Page where you can indicate on which newsletter categories you want to subscribe/unsubscribe.

On Contact level, this works fine.

But on Account level:

- For starters, you must turn off the "Outbound ID for Consuming App" on the link to the Preference page, as the page throws an error upon submit. It seems it cannot understand that it needs to write an interaction to the Account if the Outbound ID refers to an Account

- And even when not using the outbound id / prefilling, but just putting an empty email address box on the form, the effect is that an additional, anonymous contact is created with this email address, which gets (un)subscribed, instead of the account with that email address being unsubscribed.

So, how can we then unsubscribe on Account level?

Kr

Joyca

entry.title: Issue with Marketing Area Mapping (BAdI) from BP to IC
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we're facing the following problem:

During the BP replication from SAP Sales Cloud to SAP Marketing Cloud we use the Sales Organization ID to write a value (in the mapping on CPI) into a Custom Field (YY1_MktArea).

The value in the Custom Field is the value of the corresponding Marketing Area (e.g. CXXGLOBAL).

So the logic on CPI is e.g. "If Sales Organization ID is ABC then write CXXGLOBAL into YY1_MktArea".

Currently we use two different Sales Orgs / Marketing Areas.

This works fine.

In SAP Marketing Cloud we use the BAdI CUAN_BUPA_MAP_MKT_AREA to write the value of the Custom Field into the Marketing Area.

Custom Logic:

DATA lv_marketing_area TYPE if_cuan_bupa_map_types=>ty_ic_marketing_area.
lv_marketing_area = bp_general_data-include-yy1_mktarea_bus.
APPEND lv_marketing_area TO ic_marketing_areas.

It seems to work but we noticed that from time to time the BAdI does not set the correct Marketing Area for the Interaction Contact (Corporate Acccount).

I checked the incoming message for the Business Partner in the Message Dashboard app and saw that the value in the Custom Field is correct for the Business Partner (e.g. CXXGLOBAL), but the Corporate Account has the wrong Marketing Area.

So from my perspective the problem is the BAdI.

Did anybody ever face that issue, too?

May that have anything to do with the data load?

Because for us the issue seems to come up when we replicate a lot of data from C4C to MC.

When we replicate that specific single Corporate Account again from C4C, is gets the correct Marketing Area set in Marketing Cloud.

BR Tobias

entry.title: How to get current date in Logic for Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Hi community,

i have a custom business object with a row of dates.

I have to check these dates against the current date of the system.

In onPrem i could use sy-datum but it is not permitted to access this field in the cloud.

After research i found, that i have to build a custom CDS view, but i could not find the primary source that is mentioned in the post.

How can i access the current date in the current version of the public cloud?

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: How to loop over custom business object and set a column to specific value
entry.content:
Hello community,

i have a custom business object that contains a column (e.g. coldates) with many different dates.

I need to find the next three days from today on.

If I have found the appropriate row, the column (colNext) should be assigned the value 1.

I tried to create action logic for the CBO, but there I could only access one row of the CBO. It is necessary to trigger the logic without a change of the custom business object.

How can I create custom logic to solve this issue?

Kind regards

entry.title: Yahoo and Google Email Privacy Changes
entry.content:
Hey Experts,

From what I understand, Yahoo and Google require senders to support 'Easy Opt Out', otherwise emails are likely to be junked. Apparently this can be achieved by adding ‘list-unsubscribe’ to the header section of the email. As we're unable to edit the header section of the email template, we're unable to update them. I've raise this with support who are unable to help. This blog from Hubspot explains the change in more detail.

Other email service providers are making the change on their customers behalf. Not sure what we can do to resolve this.

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud: Custom attributes of Marketing Permission check in Suppression Rules
entry.content:
Dear SMC Experts,

I want to ask you for help regarding the Suppression Rules BAdI available in SAP Marketing Cloud. We need to extend the Marketing Permission by custom fields in which we will store Opt-In/Opt-Out for specific topics per Communication Medium. Then during the Campaign execution based on the selected topic in the Campaign Header, we need to send communication only to those contacts that have Opt-In for this topic.

I wanted to ask if have you maybe implemented a similar solution and what will be the best approach. Currently, the only solution we found is to check values in custom fields by using one of the following CDS views C_MKT_CONTACTPERMISSIONQ / I_MKT_CONTACTSUBSCRIPTIONC (we can extend only these two views by MP custom fields). Is there any better approach to implementing it and checking the MP of each contact without using CDS views? Our main concern is the performance of such implementation.

We will appreciate every suggestion regarding possible solutions.

Best Regards,
Jakub

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Is it possible to monitor approval workflows for Campaigns?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Is there a way in SAP Marketing Cloud to monitor the Approval Workflow? 

For example: An approval workflow for Campaigns has four approvals required, 4 different team leaders must approve the campaign for it to change to "Approved" Status. But once the workflow has started, is there a way to see who has approved and who hasn't has approved yet? 

Is there a way to see, for example, that the campaign has been approved by the first and second team members, but it is still not approved by the third member, therefore the campaign still needs their approval to move on?

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud: Get Communication Category from Interaction_Data in BadI
entry.content:
I am implementing BadI "Revise Interaction Data Before Import" and looking at subscription-related interactions.  Can anyone point me in the direction of how to get the Communication Category ID/description for a newsletter? (e.g. for an interaction of type "NEWSLETTER_SUBSCR")  I assume it's stored somewhere in the INTERACTION_DATA but I can't see which field it would be stored in.

Thanks

SAP Marketing SAP Marketing Cloud

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud: One Click Unsubscribe button not visible in emails
entry.content:
Hello Community!

My company is getting ready for the google deliverability updates. According to these updates, it is required for us to enable a "one click unsubscribe button" to our emails.

We have followed the steps detailed under "Automatic Unsubscribe for Emails (List Unsubscribe)" and we have also added an email address for unsubscribing based on the links here:

  • Unsubscribe for Emails and Text Messages | SAP Help Portal 
  • Opting-Out and Unsubscribing by Email | SAP Help Portal

In the Sender Profiles in the options for the header we have opt for Email Address for unsubscribing. Since Sinch Email 365 is our ESP, we have used the email address that is presetted and recommended (unsubscribe@eusmtp.email.sdi.sinch.com). See also picture attached.

Even though, when we tested receiving an email, no unsubscribe button or any link in the email body or header of the email is visible.

So my question is:

Is there any additional step we must configure? I thought only the email address was necessary for the unsubscribe button to be visible, but are we missing something?

Thanks in advance,

Rebeca.

entry.title: more than one email address with opt-in - which email will receive the email campaign?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am wondering what the logic is in the SAP Marketing Cloud for email campaigns if a contact has more than one email address with an opt-in. Which of the email addresses is the campaign sent to?

I was assuming that it is the email with the most recent opt-in, but it is not. 

Is there a logic or is it just random?

Best regards,

Valeska

entry.title: Update Custom CBO from BAdi or Custom logic using
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to create new record to custom CBO from SAP Marketing cloud BAdi 

I have tried following this URL but I am getting an error " 403 Unified Connectivity: Forbidden" 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/update-custom-cbo-from-badi/qaq-p/12385756

Communication Scenario

Communication Arrangement

Communication System

In the below code while executing line DATA(response3) = lo_client->send( request2 ).

I am getting error " 403 Unified Connectivity: Forbidden"

I am not sure where I have to maintain HTTP user and password , it is already maintained in the communication arragment.

Please could you help me.

Thanks.


" Step:1-* Check if communication arrangement is available and active
TRY.
CHECK cl_ble_http_client=>is_service_available(
communication_scenario = 'YY1_INT_HTTP'
outbound_service = 'YY1_INT_HTTP_REST'
) = abap_true.
CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx_error_http_service).
"for All errors
lv_MSGV1 = lx_error_http_service->status_code.
lv_MSGV2 = lx_error_http_service->status_description.
CONCATENATE lv_MSGV1 lv_MSGV2 INTO Data(lv_return_message).
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).
ENDTRY.

lv_return_message = 'HTTP Service Check Sucessfull'.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).
TRY.

" Step:2-* Create HTTP client for the Outbound Service
DATA(lo_client) = cl_ble_http_client=>create(
communication_scenario = 'YY1_INT_HTTP'
outbound_service = 'YY1_INT_HTTP_REST'
).
CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx_error_OS_creation).
"for All errors
lv_MSGV1 = lx_error_OS_creation->status_code.
lv_MSGV2 = lx_error_OS_creation->status_description.
CONCATENATE lv_MSGV1 lv_MSGV2 INTO lv_return_message.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).
ENDTRY.

lv_return_message = 'Create HTTP request is successful'.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).


" Step:3-* Create HTTP request and Fetch CSRF toker
TRY.
DATA(request) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).
DATA lv_s2p TYPE string VALUE '/YY1_PRODUCT_MASTER_HELPER_CDS/YY1_PRODUCT_MASTER_HELPER?$top=1 '.
request->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'X-CSRF-TOKEN' value = 'FETCH' ).
request->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'Accept' value = 'application/json' ).
request->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'Content_Type' value = 'application/json' ).
request->set_method( 'GET' )->set_resource_extension( lv_s2p ).

cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( 'Before reading CSEF token' ).

DATA(response1) = lo_client->send( request ).
DATA(lv_csrf1) = response1->get_header_parameter( 'x-csrf-token' ).

cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( 'After reading CSEF token' ).

CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx_error_fetch_csrf).
"for All errors
lv_MSGV1 = lx_error_fetch_csrf->status_code.
lv_MSGV2 = lx_error_fetch_csrf->status_description.
CONCATENATE lv_MSGV1 lv_MSGV2 INTO lv_return_message.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).
ENDTRY.

lv_return_message = 'Fetch CSRF toker is successful'.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).


" Step:4- * Concatenate json format body
TRY.
IF lv_csrf1 IS NOT INITIAL.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_csrf1 ).
DATA ls_double_quot TYPE string VALUE '"'.
DATA ls_single_comm TYPE string VALUE ','.
DATA ls_double_coll TYPE string VALUE ':'.
DATA ls_open_brack TYPE string VALUE '{'.
DATA ls_clos_brack TYPE string VALUE '}'.
DATA ls_single_dot TYPE string VALUE '.'.

DATA ls_product_id TYPE string VALUE '"ProductID"'.
DATA ls_Status TYPE string VALUE '"Status"'.
DATA Remarks TYPE string VALUE '"SAP_Description"'.

data(lst_status) = 'Not Existing'.
data(lst_remarks) = 'from Revise Interaction Before Creation BAdi'.

* { "PRODUCT_ID": "98765", "STATUS": "Not Existing", "SAP_Description": "from Revise Interaction Before Creation BAdi" }.
CONCATENATE ls_open_brack ls_product_id ls_double_coll ls_double_quot lv_product_id ls_double_quot ls_single_comm INTO Data(lv3_product_id).
CONCATENATE ls_Status ls_double_coll ls_double_quot lst_status ls_double_quot ls_single_comm INTO Data(lv3_status).
CONCATENATE Remarks ls_double_coll ls_double_quot lst_remarks ls_double_quot ls_clos_brack INTO Data(lv3_remarks).

CONCATENATE lv3_product_id lv3_status lv3_remarks INTO Data(lv_payloadp).
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_payloadp ).

" Step:6- * Calling service
DATA(request2) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).
DATA lv_s3p TYPE string VALUE 'YY1_PRODUCT_MASTER_HELPER_CDS/YY1_PRODUCT_MASTER_HELPER'.
request2->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'x-csrf-token' value = lv_csrf1 ).
request2->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'Accept' value = 'application/json' ).
request2->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'Content_Type' value = 'application/json' ).
request2->set_method( 'POST' )->set_resource_extension( lv_s3p ).
request2->set_body( lv_payloadp ).

cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( 'Before sending Payload' ).
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_payloadp ).

DATA(response3) = lo_client->send( request2 ).
DATA(lv_xml) = response3->get_body( ).
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_xml ).

lv_return_message = 'Final Service Call is successful'.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).

ENDIF ."IF lv_csrf1 IS NOT INITIAL.
CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx_error_Call_Service).
"for All errors
lv_MSGV1 = lx_error_Call_Service->status_code.
lv_MSGV2 = lx_error_Call_Service->status_description.
CONCATENATE lv_MSGV1 lv_MSGV2 INTO lv_return_message.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).

RETURN.
ENDTRY.

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Landing Page Favicon
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement to add our brand logo to the browser tab (i.e., using favicon) for the landing pages hosted by SAP.  As it's not possible edit the <link> tag of the pages, we're unable to add the logo.  Does anyone have a workaround?  I have raised a support ticket - as I beleive this is something that needs doing on our behalf - but was advised to raise the request within the community. SAP Marketing Cloud 

Thank you in advance!

Regards

Brad

entry.title: Campaign Approval Workflow restart after rejection
entry.content:
I have implemented a Campaign Approval workflow for our client. The workflow itself works correctly. When the request is rejected the campaign status sets to "In Preparation" as it is described in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_MARKETING_CLOUD/b88f770e4b7c4ecead5477e7a6c7b8f7/a4e2abf0b4db41ad95c1b11f002f0c7f.html

If the editor again clicks on the "Submit for Approval" button the workflow is not started again, but the campaign status is directly set to "Released" and the editor could start the campaign without an approval.

Why does the campaign approval workflow not restart? In my opinion this is a general business use case. What is the recommendation to deal with the campaign after a rejection?
